label: Discovery query
text: mid-market logistics and supply-chain software vendors with shipment, route, or warehouse data and limited public AI positioning

label: AI posture audit
text: Which Tier A or B logistics platforms own freight or warehouse data but have no AI route or ETA optimization, and what public evidence supports it?

label: Apollo persona targets
text: Find VP product, head of data, and operations leaders at logistics software vendors who can own an AI optimization roadmap.

label: K2 metadata manifest
text: Upload logistics lead evidence with run_id, criteria_hash, source_type, freight_vertical, signal_tags, and outreach_angle metadata.
